framework.name: Transient states are the actual damage window
framework.description: Formal analyses that collapse transient states (EIA = revocation in-flight, MIC = cascade revocation pending sub-agent acks) into atomic transitions systematically underestimate the damage window. This is the multi-hop problem formalized: MIC state duration IS the delegation depth penalty.
framework.raw_quote: The transient states are not cosmetic: the duration of EIA and MIC is precisely the interval over which unauthorised operations accumulate.

source.title: [PDF] Structural Equivalence Between Memory Consistency Models ... - arXiv
